Title:
Title-Source: body_internal|generated
No-Joke-Found: false

Pat and Mike were talking.

Pat asked, "How's your business going? What are you doing these days, anyway?"

Mike said, "Oh, I sell used dromedaries to old knights of the Round Table."

"Really?" Pat said. "How interesting! Where do you work? What's the name of the place, m'boy?"

"I work down at the Camelot," Mike replied.

-- Doug Graves
